body_excerpt: In pipe_resize_results of pipe.c, there is a possible UAF bug caused by a race condition. This could lead to local denial of service and local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In pipe_resize_results of pipe.c, there is a possible UAF bug caused by a race condition. This could lead to local denial of service and local escalation of privilege with no additional execution priv
